name: Zucchini with Ground Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan, sauté meat and onions together in oil until the meat is brown and crumbly.
2. Add tomatoes, tomato sauce, tomato paste, green peppers, grated cheese, zucchini slices, and olives.
3. Stir in seasonings.
4. Simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Transfer mixture to an 8 x 12-inch baking dish and sprinkle generously with Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until the sauce is thickened and the top is nicely browned and slightly crusty.
